title: Floral Silky Canadian Meal Bake
description: A creamy, egg-free-friendly dish featuring the delicate flavor of gelatin leaves and fermented ingredients. Perfect for a comforting meal prep.

ingredients.name: Garnish (optional): chopped nuts or seeds
ingredients.notes: Choose your favorite nuts or seeds

instructions: Rehydrate the gelatin leaves in 240ml of cold water for 5 minutes.
In a blender, combine the tapioca starch, flaxseed, cucumber juice, coconut water, fermented vegetables, olive oil, and salt. Blend until smooth.
Add the rehydrated gelatin leaves to the blender and blend until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a 20x20cm baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges start to set.
Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Cut into squares and serve with your choice of garnish (if using).
